case_title: GOLD, CRAIG VS SAN FRANCISCO AUTO RETURN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AUTO RETURN
